subcodes.first_line: That which thou didst send hath reached the Wronged One, and from it We perceived the fragrance of thy love. We answer thee through this Tablet [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد حضر لدی المظلوم ما ارسلته و وجدنا منه عرف حبک اجبناک بهذا الکتاب
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @love of God, @power of prayer
